description_long: This object consists of two large, rectangular outdoor trash bins, one green and one gray, each with a slightly domed, hinged lid. Both bins are made of molded plastic and feature a pair of small wheels at the rear base for easy mobility. The lids are designed to fit snugly, with a raised edge and a recessed central area, and the bins have integrated handles at the rear just above the wheels. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with no visible texturing or decorative elements. There are no visible labels, recycling symbols, or instructions on either bin. The bins are typical of those found on city streets, sidewalks, or in residential neighborhoods for waste collection.
description: Two large, wheeled plastic trash bins—one green and one gray—with domed, hinged lids and integrated rear handles. Both bins are unmarked and have a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the green bin on the left and the gray bin on the right, highlighting the domed lids and smooth surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view with the gray bin in front and the green bin behind, clearly displaying the wheels and the rear handles.
description_view_2: Rear view of both bins, emphasizing the wheels, integrated handles, and the back contours of the bins.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the green bin in front and the gray bin behind, again showing the wheels and the lid design.
